memories.content: Before running async migrations, verify the background job queue is healthy and has capacity. Check `ee status --json` for migration_queue readiness. If migration_queue shows 'degraded', wait or scale workers before proceeding.

A production migration failed when the async backfill job was started without checking queue depth. The job queue had 50k pending items and the new migration jobs hit a timeout. Rollback required manual intervention to clear the stuck migration state.

Async migrations must include a rollback plan. Before starting, record the pre-migration schema version with `ee remember --kind checkpoint`. After migration completes, verify with `ee check --migration-status`.
